cross_scene_arcs.title: Escalation of Coercive Interrogation Tactics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti progresses from controlled intelligence gathering to physical coercion and psychological pressure in interrogations of Danny, reflecting a hardening approach to extract information.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: using shock gun and threats to enforce compliance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: reliability of information obtained under duress

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Relationship with Danny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti's relationship with informant Danny shifts from authoritative control to physical confrontation, mockery, and ultimately lethal enmity.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: final confrontation ends in Garcetti's death at Danny's hands
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: mutual distrust and unresolved hostility leading to fatal outcome

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Clandestine Operations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti transitions from lawful surveillance to illegal preparations and participation in a covert, violent operation involving stolen money and unauthorized force.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: using technical surveillance to gather evidence
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: engaged in armed, off-the-books operation resulting in murder and theft
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: nature and legitimacy of the operation remain ambiguous

cross_scene_arcs.title: Operational Partnership with Tanner
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti and Tanner maintain a consistent, coordinated partnership throughout the operation, evolving from intelligence gathering to joint planning and enforcement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: present in operational vehicle with Tanner
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: deepened complicity in clandestine activity with Tanner
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: shared accountability for illegal actions remains unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Progression Toward Final Confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti moves from securing operational advantages to direct involvement in a violent takedown, culminating in betrayal and death during the raid.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Domingo is eliminated, removing a threat
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: killed by Danny after attempting to seize stolen money
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Garcetti's intent to kill Danny remains unfulfilled

cross_scene_arcs.title: Informant Handling and Intelligence Extraction
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner systematically manages Danny as an informant, extracting intelligence while maintaining operational control, though methods shift from professional handling to complicity in coercion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: gains confession under coercion, but credibility and ethics are compromised
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Danny's full motivation and reliability remain unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Deteriorating Relationship with Danny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner's relationship with Danny evolves from controlled handler-informant dynamics to open hostility, culminating in betrayal and fatal confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: killed by Danny in a moment of emotional and physical collapse
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: mutual distrust and unresolved personal histories fuel the breakdown

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Unauthorized Operations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner transitions from official law enforcement procedures to participation in clandestine, extralegal operations involving weapons, disguises, and covert surveillance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: preparing for an off-the-books operation with illegal gear
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: conducting unauthorized surveillance and engaging in armed confrontation
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: true authorization and legality of the operation remain unknown

cross_scene_arcs.title: Operational Response to Escalating Threats
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner responds to increasing threats—Bubba's fugitive status, Domingo's death, and Jimmy's betrayal—by escalating operational intensity, moving toward direct, covert intervention.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: positioned for direct action at Pooh-Bear's compound
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Bubba remains at large and target movements are unpredictable

cross_scene_arcs.title: Identity Performance and Fragmentation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom cycles through constructed, rejected, and finally fragmented identities, from performing a false self to declaring past identities dead and ultimately adopting 'speed freak' as a terminal label.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: maintaining a constructed identity through ritual
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: adopting 'speed freak' as a final, self-accepting but self-annihilating identity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: the truth and ownership of his life story

cross_scene_arcs.title: Emotional Dependence and Relationship Erosion
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom's deep emotional bond with Liz deteriorates under financial strain and personal insecurity, moving from intimate vulnerability to defensive withdrawal.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: emotionally exposed and connected to Liz through shared intimacy
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally disconnected, defensive, and withdrawn in the relationship
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: inability to address his unemployment without feeling emasculated

cross_scene_arcs.title: Revenge Mission and Public Recognition
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom completes a dangerous undercover mission to avenge his wife's murder, gains recognition from the FBI, and subsequently rejects the identity tied to that mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: driven by goal of justice for wife's murder
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: mission complete, identity as avenger discarded
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: emotional toll of the operation and personal cost of revenge

cross_scene_arcs.title: Narrative Frame and Existential Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom's story begins and ends in a burning room, framing his life as a dying confession where he seeks external validation for his identity before settling on a final, self-reductive label.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: accepting imminent death and adopting 'speed freak' as final identity
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: unclear whether he is Tom Van Allen or Danny Flynne
